# Fixture: alaysiad_banned_cant_submit
# Model: haiku
# Duration: 10.0s
# Exit: 0
# Failures: 0

## CONVERSATION
Concierge: Hi AlaysiaD! Welcome to Shiftsmart.
Partner: Is my account banned?
Concierge: I can't see account status directly, but if you're unable to log in or see shifts, it might be deactivated. You can submit a support ticket in the app to find out more.
Partner: It says this phone number belongs to a banned account
Concierge: If your account is showing as banned, I can't help reactivate it from here. You'll need to submit a support ticket in the app so the team can review your account status.
Partner: It won't let me submit a ticket because it says that I'm banned

## CONCIERGE OUTPUT
Email support@shiftsmart.com with your phone number and let them know the app says your account is banned. They can look into it from there and help you get it sorted out.
